response.justification: Over 13 years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React directly matching the primary stack, complemented by active AI-agent and MCP tooling work in the current role — an increasingly rare combination that maps cleanly to this position. Testing culture is deeply embedded across the career, from TDD-focused roles to authoring test libraries and running community workshops. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin, though the surrounding Node.js/Java depth suggests both are acquirable quickly.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience well above the 6-year requirement
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework work aligns with the role's AI agent development requirement
Consistent, demonstrated TDD and testing culture across multiple roles, libraries, and community workshops
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere despite being the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin absent from the resume; Java present but confined to older, peripheral roles
A meaningful portion of career spent on DLang and niche stacks that don't transfer directly to this role

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
